name: education_policy_workplace_injury_spike_northpine_lib_eq
premise: A Education Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education policy workplace injury spike northpine lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Ravi Berg
agents.identity: I am Ravi Berg, accountable for a defensible call in Education Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Inez Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Inez Nielsen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Ravi Berg must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Ravi Berg do?
